title: crotalaria minutissima
intro: Crotalaria minutissima, also known as dwarf crotalaria or small crotalaria, is a small shrub belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae), native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria minutissima include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and other diseases. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
